summary: Iteration 7 - Frontend Navigation Layout Testing Complete. All requested features verified: TopNavbar component visible on all 6 pages, Logo visible and clickable on all pages, all navigation links present (Terminal, All Games, Strategy Center, Trades, Portfolio, Settings), active navigation highlighted, no back/ArrowLeft buttons found on any pages, Engine status indicators (Paper Engine: RUNNING, Live Engine: STOPPED) visible on Strategy Command Center.

issues: Minor hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - caused by React rendering wrapper in tables. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: TopNavbar component (/app/frontend/src/components/TopNavbar.js) properly implemented with data-testid='top-navbar' and data-testid='logo'
Navigation links use data-testid='nav-{route}' pattern for testing
Active navigation item properly highlighted with 'bg-primary/20' class
Engine status indicators properly show 'Paper Engine: RUNNING' when Evaluation Mode is ON
Engine status indicators properly show 'Live Engine: STOPPED' when Auto Mode is OFF
No ArrowLeft icons or back buttons found on any tested pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation layout changes verified in iteration 7. TopNavbar is now global across all pages with Logo (data-testid='logo'), navigation links, and theme toggle. Engine status indicators show Paper Engine RUNNING/STOPPED based on Evaluation Mode toggle and Live Engine RUNNING/STOPPED based on Auto Mode toggle. Hydration warning in Dashboard is cosmetic only - caused by React wrapper elements in table structure.

paper_engine_status.display: Paper Engine: RUNNING (when Evaluation Mode ON)
paper_engine_status.styling: Blue text/border when running, gray when stopped

live_engine_status.display: Live Engine: STOPPED (when Auto Mode OFF)
live_engine_status.styling: Purple text/border when running, gray when stopped
